---
title: "Gem Wars — Lore (v0.33)"
date: "2026-05-20"
description: "Canonical lore for Gem Wars' three sentient elements — Mud, Lava, Water — and the factions they became. Origins, death semantics, gem-relationships, visual register, and a small canon of stories. Pinned so engine, art, and writing all reference the same source."
categories: [fiction, lore, gem wars, worldbuilding]
path: /gem-wars-lore.html
---

```{=html}
<p>Redirecting to <a href="/gem-wars-lore.html">the standalone page</a>…</p>
<script>window.location.replace("/gem-wars-lore.html");</script>
```
